mapper.select: /* jaram.common.mapper.CommonMapper.selectFileList [file list 조회]*/ SELECT SEQ , EDT_SEQ , ORG_FILE_NAME , SAVE_FILE_NAME , FILE_SIZE , DATE_FORMAT(INPUT_DT, '%y%m%d') AS INPUT_DT , INPUT_ID FROM FILE_INFO WHERE EDT_SEQ = #{SEQ}

/* jaram.common.mapper.CommonMapper.selectOneFile [file 조회]*/ SELECT SEQ , EDT_SEQ , ORG_FILE_NAME , SAVE_FILE_NAME , FILE_SIZE , DATE_FORMAT(INPUT_DT, '%y%m%d') AS INPUT_DT , INPUT_ID FROM FILE_INFO WHERE SEQ = #{FILE_SEQ}

SELECT /* jaram.common.mapper.CommonMapper.selectSitePolicy [사이트 정책 조회]*/ POLICY_CODE , POLICY_NAME , CONVERT(POLICY_CONTENT USING UTF8) AS POLICY_CONTENT , INPUT_DT , INPUT_ID , UPDATE_DT , UPDATE_ID FROM SITE_POLICY WHERE POLICY_CODE = #{POLICY_CODE}

SELECT /* jaram.common.mapper.CommonMapper.selectSitePolicyList [사이트 정책 목록 조회]*/ POLICY_CODE , POLICY_NAME , CONVERT(POLICY_CONTENT USING UTF8) AS POLICY_CONTENT , INPUT_DT , INPUT_ID , UPDATE_DT , UPDATE_ID FROM SITE_POLICY ORDER BY ORD
